No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to health, well-being, or related medical statistics.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops essential statistical skills for employment and data interpretation (Target 4.4).
evidence: 會以統計軟體進行敘述統計

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to water, sanitation, or related environmental issues.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to energy access, renewables, or efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course, using 'Statistics for Business & Economics' and focusing on business applications, directly provides skills for higher economic productivity (Target 8.2) and productive employment (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course enhances scientific research and technological capabilities (Target 9.5) by teaching statistical theory, computational methods, and practical application using R software.
evidence: 統計學的理論、計算方法

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to reducing inequalities in income, opportunity, or representation.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to urban development, housing, or infrastructure for communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to sustainable consumption, waste reduction, or resource efficiency.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or resilience.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or fisheries management.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to peace, justice, governance, or institutional development.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course directly contributes to statistical capacity-building (Target 17.19) by teaching data analysis, statistical inference, and interpretation of reports, essential for measuring sustainable development progress.
evidence: 會解釋統計軟體所產生的報表及圖表的意涵
